title: resolve a conflicting exclusive borrow (E0801)
statement: This program does not compile: two live exclusive borrows of `x` overlap. Fix the single reported defect so it compiles clean and `main` returns 7 (`x` incremented twice from 5).

given_diagnostic.message: conflicting borrow of `x` (an exclusive borrow excludes all other borrows) (§2.2)

notes.message: ...conflicts with the borrow of `x` created here
a place under a live borrow may be accessed only through that borrow (§2.2)
